svg.title: HDLC frame structure showing all fields from flag to flag
svg.desc: Horizontal diagram of an HDLC frame: opening flag, address, control, data, FCS checksum, closing flag. Bit stuffing applies to all fields between the flags.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the HDLC flag byte and why is it 01111110?')
sendPrompt('What is the address field in HDLC?')
sendPrompt('What is the control field in HDLC?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the HDLC data field?')
sendPrompt('What is FCS error checking in HDLC?')
sendPrompt('Why does HDLC have a closing flag?')

svg.text: bit stuffing applied to all bits in here
receiver sees flag → stores bits → sees flag again → frame complete
